---
title: "Exploratory Grand Model (All Three Architectures)"
subtitle: "BBB (Building) / BUB (Understanding) / BRB (Relationship) — Chatzi framework, all architectures"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  error: true
  warning: false
  message: true
  cache: false
---

```{r setup}
source(here::here("R", "00_paths.R"))
source(here::here("R", "01_packages.R"))
source(here::here("R", "12_lavaan_models.R"))
source(here::here("R", "11_fit_helpers.R"))
source(here::here("R", "20_fit_cfa.R"))
source(here::here("R", "10_datasets.R"))
stopifnot(exists("DATASETS"))
message("Datasets: fc=", nrow(DATASETS$fc), " bo=", nrow(DATASETS$bo),
        " ro=", nrow(DATASETS$ro), " cross=", nrow(DATASETS$cross))
message("REF in fc: ", "REF" %in% names(DATASETS$fc))
message("REF in ro: ", "REF" %in% names(DATASETS$ro))
```

# Stage 1 — Fit each model, extract factor scores

```{r fit-fc}
message("Fitting Faircloth on DATASETS$fc ...")
fit_fc <- tryCatch(
  lavaan::cfa(cfa_fc_higher_order_original(), data = DATASETS$fc,
              estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml", std.lv = TRUE),
  error = function(e) { message("FC error: ", e$message); NULL })
message("FC converged: ", !is.null(fit_fc) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_fc,"converged"))

fs_fc <- if (!is.null(fit_fc) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_fc,"converged")) {
  tryCatch(as.data.frame(lavaan::lavPredict(fit_fc)),
           error = function(e) { message("FC lavPredict: ", e$message); NULL })
} else NULL
message("FC factor scores: ", if(is.null(fs_fc)) "NONE" else paste(ncol(fs_fc),"cols"))
if (!is.null(fs_fc)) names(fs_fc) <- paste0("FC.", names(fs_fc))
```

```{r fit-bo}
message("Fitting Boenigk on DATASETS$bo ...")
fit_bo <- tryCatch(
  lavaan::cfa(cfa_bo_original(), data = DATASETS$bo,
              estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml", std.lv = TRUE),
  error = function(e) { message("BO error: ", e$message); NULL })
message("BO converged: ", !is.null(fit_bo) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_bo,"converged"))

fs_bo <- if (!is.null(fit_bo) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_bo,"converged")) {
  tryCatch(as.data.frame(lavaan::lavPredict(fit_bo)),
           error = function(e) { message("BO lavPredict: ", e$message); NULL })
} else NULL
message("BO factor scores: ", if(is.null(fs_bo)) "NONE" else paste(ncol(fs_bo),"cols"))
if (!is.null(fs_bo)) names(fs_bo) <- paste0("BO.", names(fs_bo))
```

```{r fit-ro}
message("Fitting Romero on DATASETS$ro ...")
fit_ro <- tryCatch(
  lavaan::cfa(cfa_ro_original(), data = DATASETS$ro,
              estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml", std.lv = TRUE),
  error = function(e) { message("RO error: ", e$message); NULL })
message("RO converged: ", !is.null(fit_ro) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_ro,"converged"))

fs_ro <- if (!is.null(fit_ro) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_ro,"converged")) {
  tryCatch(as.data.frame(lavaan::lavPredict(fit_ro)),
           error = function(e) { message("RO lavPredict: ", e$message); NULL })
} else NULL
message("RO factor scores: ", if(is.null(fs_ro)) "NONE" else paste(ncol(fs_ro),"cols"))
if (!is.null(fs_ro)) names(fs_ro) <- paste0("RO.", names(fs_ro))
```

```{r combine-scores}
# FC + BO: same qnr1 → same rows, direct cbind
parts_fcbo <- Filter(Negate(is.null), list(fs_fc, fs_bo))
if (length(parts_fcbo) == 0) stop("Both FC and BO factor scores are NULL.")
fs_fcbo <- do.call(cbind, parts_fcbo)
message("FC+BO matrix: ", nrow(fs_fcbo), " x ", ncol(fs_fcbo))

# Add RO if row-count matches (qnr1 and qnr2 differ in n — use cross alignment)
if (!is.null(fs_ro)) {
  cross_n <- nrow(DATASETS$cross)
  message("Attempting RO alignment via cross sample (n=", cross_n, ")")
  # Use row positions from cross relative to fc and ro
  if ("CASE" %in% names(DATASETS$fc) && "CASE" %in% names(DATASETS$ro)) {
    idx_fc <- match(DATASETS$cross$CASE, DATASETS$fc$CASE)
    idx_ro <- match(DATASETS$cross$CASE, DATASETS$ro$CASE)
    ok <- !is.na(idx_fc) & !is.na(idx_ro)
    fs_all <- cbind(fs_fcbo[idx_fc[ok], ], fs_ro[idx_ro[ok], ])
    message("Aligned via CASE: ", sum(ok), " common rows")
  } else {
    message("No CASE column — using FC+BO only")
    fs_all <- fs_fcbo
  }
} else {
  message("RO not available — proceeding with FC+BO only")
  fs_all <- fs_fcbo
}

fs_all <- fs_all[, !duplicated(names(fs_all)), drop = FALSE]
fs_complete <- fs_all[complete.cases(fs_all), ]
message("Final matrix: ", nrow(fs_complete), " complete cases, ",
        ncol(fs_complete), " latent scores")
message("Columns: ", paste(names(fs_all), collapse=", "))
```

# Stage 2 — Latent correlations

```{r correlations}
if (ncol(fs_complete) < 2 || nrow(fs_complete) < 20)
  stop("Insufficient data for correlation analysis.")

cor(fs_complete, method="pearson") |> round(2) |>
  as.data.frame() |> tibble::rownames_to_column("Latent") |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::tab_header("Latent factor score correlations",
                 subtitle=paste0("n=",nrow(fs_complete)," complete cases")) |>
  gt::fmt_number(where(is.numeric), decimals=2)
```

# Stage 3 — EFA on factor scores

```{r efa}
if (nrow(fs_complete) >= 30 && ncol(fs_complete) >= 3) {
  pa <- psych::fa.parallel(fs_complete, fm="ml", fa="fa", n.iter=50, plot=FALSE)
  n_fa <- max(2, pa$nfact)
  message("EFA: ", n_fa, " factors suggested")
  fa_res <- psych::fa(fs_complete, nfactors=n_fa, rotate="oblimin", fm="ml")
  print(psych::fa.sort(fa_res), digits=2, cut=0.25)
} else {
  message("Skipping EFA — n=", nrow(fs_complete), " cols=", ncol(fs_complete))
}
```

# Stage 4 — BBB / BUB / BRB second-order CFA

```{r bbb-bub-brb}
av <- names(fs_complete)
# Chatzi framework (corrected by Chatzi feedback):
# BUB = Brand Understanding Block: awareness, familiarity, recall
BUB <- intersect(c("FC.FC_BR","FC.FC_BF","BO.BO_BF","BO.BO_RC",
                    "RO.RO_BF","RO.RO_BS"), av)
# BBB = Brand Building Block: image, associations, personality, differentiation
BBB <- intersect(c("FC.FC_BD","FC.FC_BC","FC.FC_BS",
                    "RO.RO_BI","RO.RO_BA","RO.RO_BD","RO.RO_BR"), av)
# BRB = Brand Relationship Block: trust, commitment, identification
BRB <- intersect(c("BO.BO_TR","BO.BO_CO","RO.RO_AC","RO.RO_EC","RO.RO_ID"), av)

message("BBB(", length(BBB), "): ", paste(BBB, collapse=", "))
message("BUB(", length(BUB), "): ", paste(BUB, collapse=", "))
message("BRB(", length(BRB), "): ", paste(BRB, collapse=", "))

blocks <- list(BBB=BBB, BUB=BUB, BRB=BRB)
valid  <- Filter(function(x) length(x) >= 2, blocks)
if (length(valid) < 2) stop("Fewer than 2 blocks have >=2 indicators.")

so_syntax <- paste(
  sapply(names(valid), function(b)
    paste0(b, " =~ ", paste(valid[[b]], collapse=" + "))),
  collapse="\n")
cat(so_syntax, "\n")

fit_so <- tryCatch(
  lavaan::cfa(so_syntax, data=fs_complete, estimator="MLR", std.lv=TRUE),
  error = function(e) { message("SO-CFA error: ", e$message); NULL })

if (!is.null(fit_so) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_so,"converged")) {
  fm <- lavaan::fitMeasures(fit_so, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr"))
  message(sprintf("CFI=%.3f TLI=%.3f RMSEA=%.3f SRMR=%.3f",
                  fm["cfi"],fm["tli"],fm["rmsea"],fm["srmr"]))
  std <- lavaan::standardizedSolution(fit_so)
  std[std$op=="=~", c("lhs","rhs","est.std","pvalue")] |>
    dplyr::rename(Block=lhs,Latent=rhs,lambda=est.std,p=pvalue) |>
    dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(lambda,p),~round(.x,3))) |>
    gt::gt() |> gt::tab_header("BBB/BUB/BRB second-order loadings")
}
```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
